word: G3201 - μέμφομαι - mémphomai - mem'-fom-ahee - Find fault

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μέμφομαι

- Transliteration: memphomai

- Phonetic: mem'-fom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to blame, find fault

- Origin: middle voice of an apparently root word

- TDNT entry: 13:31,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Middle voice of an apparently primary verb; to blame: - find fault.
